/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/INTC/MO PC 1385:PLEA IN #19016072/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS (THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTIONOR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS ANDCONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN 19016072/
